content: Build pine_exporter.py: faithful baked-model Pine v6 generator (GMM softmax + HMM forward-filter) - verified to machine precision vs Python
Add backend endpoint /api/pine-script/generate?symbol=&regime_model= (threadpool) returning the baked Pine file
Wire frontend Download Pine Script button to generate per selected symbol + regime model
Validate end-to-end (endpoint curl + UI download) and clean up temp files
Update plan.md with the Pine export phase
